title: The Witness Development Archive
creator: Thekla
description: Development posts published during production, covering architecture, graphics, tools, audio, playtesting, puzzle work, and release preparation.
useful: A rare chronological record that lets readers compare individual production problems across one long project.

manualLinkStatus.note: Official archive opened successfully in a browser; the site rejects some automated checks.

audience: Developers and researchers studying one game's design across several disciplines and years.
learning: Follow production problems in chronological context
Compare architecture, graphics, tools, audio, and puzzles
Connect individual decisions to a finished creative direction
